name: GSSTech Group
description: Global Software Solutions Group (GSS) has been a leading and award winning player in the field of real-time payments and has established partnerships with leading Global software providers with a vision to be a single-window provider of technology solutions to the banking industry. We are also the strategic vendor of ENBD and FAB for their resourcing needs. Our headquarters are in Dubai Internet City. Our key clients are FAB, Finance house, Al Maryah Community bank, United Arab bank, EDB, Lulu Exchange, Lari Exchange, Deem finance. Our Website is gsstechgroup.com.

jobs.title: Automation Engineer - Node.js & AI Integration
jobs.description:
We are seeking a skilled Automation Engineer with strong expertise in Node.js to join our engineering team. The ideal candidate has hands-on experience building full-stack applications and leveraging AI code generation tools to accelerate development workflows and improve engineering efficiency.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and maintain scalable full-stack applications using Node.js and React
  • Build and optimise RESTful APIs and microservices
  • Develop responsive, high-performance user interfaces using React
  • Integrate and effectively utilise AI code generation tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, Cursor)
  • Apply prompt engineering techniques to enhance coding productivity
  • Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and implement features
  • Participate in code reviews and contribute to engineering best practices
  • Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve production issues

Required Qualifications

  • 3+ years of experience in full-stack development
  • Strong proficiency in Node.js (Express, NestJS, or similar frameworks)
  • Experience with TypeScript
  • Hands-on experience with AI code generation tools and prompt engineering
  • Strong understanding of RESTful API design principles and best practices
  • Proficiency in SQL and NoSQL databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis)
  • Experience with Git and CI/CD pipelines

jobs.title: Business Development Manager - Outsourcing & IT Staffing
jobs.description:
Role Overview:

GSS is seeking a high-calibre Business Development Manager with an established network and active, existing client relationships in the UAE/GCC outsourcing and IT staffing market. This is a pure hunter role — the successful candidate will be expected to leverage their existing enterprise relationships to generate immediate pipeline and accelerate revenue growth for GSS's Outsourcing business line.  

We are looking for someone who brings a fresh perspective and an independent network — a professional, who can open new doors and introduce GSS to decision-makers of the clients they do not currently reach. The benchmark for this hire is a senior BD professional with a track record comparable to leading relationship managers at top UAE financial institutions. 

Key Responsibilities:

  • Leverage existing client relationships across UAE/GCC enterprises, banks, and FinTechs to generate qualified outsourcing leads from day one 
  • Own and grow a pipeline of IT outsourcing and staffing opportunities — ODC models, resource augmentation, and managed services 
  • Conduct senior-level client engagements, present GSS's outsourcing proposition, and negotiate commercial terms 
  • Develop tailored proposals, rate cards, and commercial offers in coordination with delivery and operations teams 
  • Identify new verticals and market segments for GSS's outsourcing services beyond the existing client base 
  • Represent GSS at industry events, forums, and networking platforms to build brand visibility 
  • Collaborate internally with delivery leads to ensure smooth transition from BD to execution 
  • Meet defined revenue and pipeline targets within the first 6 months, with quarterly review milestones 

Requirements

Must-Have 

• 8–12+ years in B2B Business Development / Sales in IT Outsourcing, Staffing, or Managed Services 

• Proven, active relationships with enterprise clients and decision-makers in UAE — independent of the current GSS network 

• Demonstrated track record of independently closing outsourcing or staffing contracts in UAE/GCC 

• Experience with financial institutions, banks, or large corporates as outsourcing clients 

• Self-driven, target-oriented professional with a genuine hunter mindset 

• Excellent communication, negotiation, and executive presentation skills 

Strong Advantage 

• Prior experience at or deep relationships across UAE in different domains. 

• Background in technology consulting or delivery — understands ODC / offshore models 

• Arabic language proficiency 


Performance Expectations

•     New client revenue is expected within 6 months of joining.

•     Performance metrics include pipeline value, qualified opportunity count, proposals submitted, and revenue closed

What GSS Offers

•      Competitive salary

•      Opportunity to own and shape the Outsourcing BD function with direct leadership visibility

•      Access to GSS's existing client portfolio and cross-sell opportunities across Payments, Open Finance, and Certification

•      Lean, fast-moving organization where your results are visible and rewarded

•      Dubai Internet City base — at the heart of the UAE's technology ecosystem

jobs.title: Business Intelligence Engineer - Power BI (For a leading UAE bank)
jobs.description:
Description of Knowledge / Skill etc.

A. Education

  • Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative field (e.g., Computer Science, IT, Statistics, Mathematics, Finance)

B. Experience

  • 4-7 years in data visualization
  • Data & analytics experience
  • Banking domain experience
  • Agile working environment experience

C. Knowledge & Skills

  • Ability to visualize analytics insights
  • Proficiency in Tableau & Power BI (and SSRS)
  • Experience with large datasets (Hadoop & SQL)
  • Technical proficiency in database design and data mining
  • Ability to identify process improvements and challenge stakeholder requirements
  • Experience in Python for data science and automation
  • Familiarity with Github and front-end web development (D3.js)

D. Behavioral Competencies

  • Ability to derive insights from data and communicate them effectively
  • Concern for user experience
  • Creative thinking and advocacy for data visualization best practices
  • Excellent communication and problem-solving skills
  • Collaborative team player and quick learner
  • Detail-oriented and up-to-date with latest technologies
